title: Gin’s Gratitude Reveals Sanji’s Kindness
description: On pages 7–10, Sanji feeds Gin despite the danger, revealing that his compassion for the hungry matters more to him than restaurant rules or pirate labels.
scene: Gin arrives broken and starving, while the Baratie cooks judge him as an enemy; Sanji alone treats hunger as something that must be answered.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A skull with two hourglasses at its side, to threaten their enemies...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no doubt about it! That's KrieG's flag!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look what you did, Patty! They actually came here! So are you gonna chase them off for us, Mr. Tough guy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I-it can't be! The fleet Admiral who commands over 5000 pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is coming all the way out here to just to avenge one of his underlings!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well you better believe it! His ship's coming this way right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is real bad! Shouldn't we be running away!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Bro, let's set sail! We don't wanna die!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Talk about a huge ship! Gin must've come here to repay his debt to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Somehow I don't think that's the case... but it is strange...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to turn a gigantic gallon of that size into that sad state...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: They must've been caught up in some natural disaster.

summary: This part reveals the core of Sanji’s morality: no matter who a person is, he cannot ignore someone starving in front of him.
